content.title: 4 Performance monitoring
content.text:
A detailed description of the performance standards and performance indicators required by item 7 of Schedule 17 to be included in the safety management system.

Schedule 18 Additional matters to be included in safety case for a major hazard facility

content.title: 5.1 At all points in the safety case where the matter addressed is covered by the safety management system, a clear reference to the relevant part of the documented safety management system.
5.2 A description of those parts of the documented safety management system that address the ongoing effective implementation and ongoing review and revision of the safety management system.
6 Safety and reliability of facility structures and plant
content.text: A description of the steps taken to ensure that safety and reliability are incorporated into the design and construction of all aspects of the major hazard facility itself, whether the operator is directly engaged in the design and construction or has engaged another person to carry out the design and construction.

content.title: 7 Major incident history
content.text: A summary of the major incidents that have occurred at the major hazard facility over the previous 5 years.
